title: UE5 Top Down Survival Shooter
summary: Implemented several user interface widgets, including score counter, win screen, lose screen, and timers for powerups. Also programmed various Blueprint classes.

title: Jumper Hunter Ducker
summary: A mashup of classic games built in one week by a team of three. An early demo showcasing gameplay mechanics inspired by retro titles.

title: Agents of Influence - UI/UX Design
summary: Designed onboarding prototypes and improved lesson-plan flows in Figma.
